programme.title: E6 - Dream Escapes
programme.desc: Climb high up inside a historic windmill. Explore the ski slopes of Poland and check into a ski chalet with a twist. Journey to east of England to experience a night in an industrial wonder.

programme.title: E5 - Stress-Free Cooking
programme.desc: Mary joins AJ Odudu on a beautiful local allotment to teach her the joy of stress-free cooking. AJ tries her hand at a luscious tiger prawn courgetti and a rich aubergine bhuna.

programme.title: E6 - Wind Down Weekends
programme.desc: Nadiya creates dishes for the perfect wind-down weekend, visits Britain's first tea plantation in Cornwall and meets 102-year-old Nora, a homemade Marmalade champion.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: This time, Jamie shows us a roast dinner cooked all together in one pot, cutting down on washing up but never on flavour; and his store-cupboard version of a speedy carbonara that can use up whatever veg you have to hand. He shares two ways to use pre-packed ingredients to make crowd-pleasing starters or sides, and two stars of Middle Eastern cuisine show how store-cupboard spices can transform everyday ingredients into truly mouth-watering meals.

programme.desc: Goldie Hawn goes overboard for her very close friend turned family who has been by her side for four decades.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E283 -Cold War 1994
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Tales From The Occult: Ultimate Malevolence
programme.desc: “Killing Me Softly”- Magician Flora repeatedly sees illusions of her friend Maureen, who has gone missing since their last call. In an attempt to trace clues of Maureen's missing, Flora undergoes hypnosis to retrieve the memory of their conversation. Little does she know she is putting herself in danger. “No Way Out”- Ho wakes up from sleep and finds himself inside a mysterious industrial building. While looking for an exit, he bumps into corpses, phantoms, and even his ex-wife. He must find his way out before it's too late. “Memento Mori”- Two secondary school best friends, Tam and Yu, dream of becoming movie directors one day. In an accident, one unintentionally kills the other and becomes a director because of this incident.

programme.title: E15 - Cajun Chicken Confit With Pickled Fennel
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares her Southern-style chicken confit by seasoning the chicken, adding vegetables and herbs, and slow-cooking it in oil. She finishes the dish with pickled fennel and “dirty pasta”.

programme.title: E14 - Rabbit Ragu
programme.desc: Rachael teaches how to prepare rabbit ragu, a traditional Tuscan recipe that combines ground rabbit, vegetables, wine and more to make a thick sauce served over long pasta.

programme.title: E15 - Cajun Chicken Confit With Pickled Fennel
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares her Southern-style chicken confit by seasoning the chicken, adding vegetables and herbs, and slow-cooking it in oil. She finishes the dish with pickled fennel and “dirty pasta”.

programme.title: La French Touch
programme.desc: Sebastien Martin and his friend Chef Francois Audrin travel through Kochi Prefecture, visiting local farms and wineries, discovering inspiration from the producers' commitment and unique food culture.

programme.title: Y Speak 2.0[Live]
programme.desc: It is a revival and modernization of the iconic Philippine youth talk, and debate show Y Speak that originally aired on Studio 23 from 2004 to 2010. The updated version continues to explore how we can positively help shape the character of our young people and, ultimately, the future of our nation. It guides the youth to listen to the past, discern the present, and act for tomorrow.

programme.title: Y Speak 2.0[Live]
programme.desc: is the continuous story on how we can positively help shape the character of our young people, and eventually, the future of our nation. It is guiding the youth to listen to the past, discern today and act for tomorrow.

programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: The B Side S2
programme.desc: Get ready to explore the hidden world of your favorite celebrities as they share their passions and personal tales beyond the limelight! Hosted by Bianca Gonzalez, this is your exclusive peek into the 'other side' of your idols and icons!

programme.title: Tulong Ko, Pasa Mo
programme.desc: Tulong Ko Pasa Mo is a motivational and inspirational show hosted by Vic and Avelynn Garcia.

programme.title: The B Side S2
programme.desc: Get ready to explore the hidden world of your favorite celebrities as they share their passions and personal tales beyond the limelight! Hosted by Bianca Gonzalez, this is your exclusive peek into the 'other side' of your idols and icons!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Rescue Missions!
programme.desc: Join Gecko for some of his ultimate rescue missions! Blue must face his fear of a storm to save Eric the Excavator, who is stuck in a trench with a dam about to overflow! Then, Weasel fits Vicky the Ice Cream truck with a super-fast rocket, causing her to speed out of control! Gecko & the Mechanicals must stop her before she crashes. From saving a trapped Mummy Truck to rescuing the Mechs, it's always a big adventure!

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E1 - Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E6 - Twinkle's Colour Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E17 - JJ's Active Adventures & Fun!
programme.desc: It's time to move & groove with JJ's active adventures! Ms. Appleberry teaches the importance of stretching & exercise. Then, JJ learns Taekwondo & earns his first belt! The active fun continues as the kids learn to tap dance & play on the jungle gym. Plus, join JJ & his family for a super fun beach day, making sandcastles & playing in the sea, & an exciting backyard camping trip!

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E3 - What Will Cody Do Today?
programme.desc: What will Cody do today? Every day is a new adventure! He might move to a new house with his family & cat, Pickles. Or maybe he'll find a simple empty cardboard box & use his imagination to turn it into a turtle shell, a drum & a race car! He could go on a hike with JJ & race walnut sailboats, or stay home & sing the ABCs over a big pot of alphabet soup. With Cody, you never know what fun you'll have!

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E2 - Learning Fun at Home & School!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning fun at home & school! First, Mom & Dad put together a road in their backyard so the kids can learn about road safety while driving their toy cars. Then, it's time for a snack as Baby John learns his ABCs with Mom & Dad as they enjoy a delicious bowl of alphabet cereal! The learning continues at school, where the kids learn their body parts, see what's for lunch & learn how to play nicely with their friends.

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E2 - Calming Star Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: A Bee's Diary
programme.desc: In a beehive, tens of thousands of tiny animals work toward a common goal: the survival of the colony. But what is life like for an individual honeybee? A Bee’s Diary tells that story.

programme.title: Tusker: Brotherhood of Elephants
programme.desc: Become immersed in the intricate lives of tuskers with Craig, Pascal, and Esau, three male African elephants in all stages of life. Get a rare glimpse into the subtle language, complex interactions, and deep bonds of the world’s largest land mammal.

programme.title: Deep in the Heart
programme.desc: Take a journey through the eyes of catfish, ocelots, and other native creatures with narrator Matthew McConaughey. Celebrate the Lone Star State’s landscapes and wildlife, and learn how crucial conservation efforts can save Texas’ unique habitats.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: A Bee's Diary
programme.desc: In a beehive, tens of thousands of tiny animals work toward a common goal: the survival of the colony. But what is life like for an individual honeybee? A Bee’s Diary tells that story.

programme.title: Tusker: Brotherhood of Elephants
programme.desc: Become immersed in the intricate lives of tuskers with Craig, Pascal, and Esau, three male African elephants in all stages of life. Get a rare glimpse into the subtle language, complex interactions, and deep bonds of the world’s largest land mammal.

programme.title: Deep in the Heart
programme.desc: Take a journey through the eyes of catfish, ocelots, and other native creatures with narrator Matthew McConaughey. Celebrate the Lone Star State’s landscapes and wildlife, and learn how crucial conservation efforts can save Texas’ unique habitats.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E4 - Eyes
programme.desc: Why do zebras have stripes? How do penguins see underwater? And why are a tree frog’s eyes red? In this exploration of sight, discover how some animals have evolved to see extremely well while others have evolved to be nearly invisible.

programme.title: E1 - A Tale of Two Penguins
programme.desc: At the water’s edge a brave group of male penguins gather, preparing to make the dangerous journey ashore. With many threats ahead, there is safety in number and these petite penguins have important business to attend. It’s time to breed and they must find a burrow before the females arrive.

programme.title: E2 - Untamed West
programme.desc: New Zealand’s West Coast is like nowhere else on Earth. From glacier-covered mountains to rain-drenched native forests to rough frigid seas, the landscape defies belief. Isolated from the rest of the world, this strip of almost untouched wilderness hides a host of endemic animals. Evolutionary castaways, every one of them is a rare ecological jewel. From alpine parrots and shy penguins to mammal-like kiwis and ancient eels. To survive the conditions the wildlife here has to be hardy, cunning and resourceful. A journey along the West Coast reveals the beauty of this land, and the trials and tribulations of the wildlife that live here.

programme.title: E1 - Family
programme.desc: Every empire needs a succession plan. Making babies – and raising them – is crucial for every species to survive. In some social circles, it takes a village to raise a family. In others, a single parent is all that stands between the vulnerability of youth and the threats of the wild.

programme.title: E3 - Children of the Storm
programme.desc: In Iceland only one out of six cubs has survived. Abandoned by her parents, she now has to fend for herself. The reindeer herd swim two miles across open water. In Scotland, 35,000 grey seals arrive for their annual breeding season.

programme.title: E3 - So Long and Thanks for All the Fish
programme.desc: Bundle up as an icy October storm complicates the race to the finish line. See Big Boi bounce after a stumble before tragedy hits QuadMom, and cheer as fan fave BoldFace hits her stride despite her clingy kid, Raccoon. But who will wear the crown?

programme.title: E226
programme.desc: CHINA INSIGHT: China Insight is a captivating series that offers foreign hosts the opportunity to travel and observe the dynamic scenes of China's contemporary society. The series aims to showcase the significant transformations taking place in various aspects such as politics, economy, technology, and culture.
News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: E158
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: E428
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E246 - Mysteries Of Scotland
programme.desc: For thousands of years, Scotland has been an epicentre of otherworldly phenomena. It is home to strange ancient stone circles, stories of strange beings. Is Scotland a magnet for extraterrestrial visitors?

programme.title: E10 - Falling Stars
programme.desc: The team zeroes in on the island of Bermuda-namesake of the Triangle-and one of the most infamous mysteries that helped establish the dark reputation of these waters.

programme.title: E388 - Wolfemen Vs. The Automatons
programme.desc: The competitive pinball-wizard Wolfe brothers meet coin-op king Dirk at his giant poultry barn turned private arcade. Mike and Robbie enter a hangar full of ultra-rare games and choice carnival relics.

programme.title: E18 - Forged Flashbacks
programme.desc: We dig deep inside and revisit some of our favourite competitions over the years. From gladiators and Greeks to horror and holidays, join us as we look back at some of Forged in Fire's best episodes.

programme.title: A la une : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Tout ce qui fait et fera la une de la journée : économie, international, analyses et décryptages, revue de presse et grands temps forts à venir, pour suivre en continu les événements majeurs en France et dans le monde.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]

E8 - 開啟「睡眠大作戰」
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.desc: Compass was given rare access to Labassa, the historic Renaissance mansion in Melbourne to film many of the remaining tenants. We focus on the post war years of Jewish refugees and 1970's bohemians, artists and performers.

programme.title: E7 - Japan
programme.desc: After Bangladesh, Rooftop and Catfish explore the country of Japan next. They test out their careers as sumo wrestlers and ninjas (though they learn they should probably stick to BMX), eat pufferfish, a delicacy outlawed everywhere else in Asia, and try to handle Japan’s bondage culture from a dominatrix. They join in on a game of Bo Taoshi, and get saline injections to fit in with Japan’s nightlife. Before they head out from their Japanese adventures, Rooftop and Catfish finish the trip learning how to drift and even attempt jumping into their drifting car. After such an action packed visit to Japan, where will the duo’s travels take them next?

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: Undine
programme.desc: When the man she loves leaves her, a historian confronts the ancient myth that is her namesake.

programme.title: Fallen Leaves
programme.desc: Two lonely souls try to overcome various obstacles on the path to romance.

programme.title: E8 - Chris Carolina - The Beginning Of A Story...
programme.desc: This painter and fashion photographer turns his painting into his own cinema. Between abstraction and figuration, Chris Carolina's work reveals a quest for purity, love and sincerity, with the figure of woman placed at the center of his reflections.

programme.desc: The Pecourneaus are a close-knit farming family, determined, despite the accumulating debts, to save their farm. programme.title: E327
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. programme.title: E21
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.desc: The brilliant yet unconventional attorney-turned-consultant ELSBETH returns for a third season with fresh cases, new characters and unexpected challenges for her and the 11th Precinct, led by her boss, Captain C.W. Wagner.

Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

programme.desc: When Sam eats all of the moon meatballs Cat prepared for a Special Moon Dinner, Cat has to make more. Cat gets distracted when she finds a shoe and becomes obsessed with finding its matching pair.

programme.title: E4 - The Devil In Hammond
programme.desc: When a young mother, Selonia Reed, 26, is found brutally murdered in her car, detectives turn over every rock in small-town Hammond, Louisiana, in search of her killer.

programme.title: E5 - Deanna Cook
programme.desc: When mother of two, Deanna Cook, missed her daily call to her mom, her family began to worry Deanna's 'stalker' might be involved. After texting and calling Deanna, her family called 911.

programme.title: E6 - JaRay Wilson
programme.desc: JaRay Wilson texted her mother just minutes before she vanished. For over a year, the teen's friends, family, and community searched for answers.

programme.title: E1 - Reckless Driver Or Tragic Accident?
programme.desc: A woman faces life in prison when a passenger in the car she is driving is killed after she collides with an 18-wheel truck. Was she an intoxicated driver, or was it a tragic accident?

programme.title: E1 - Rocky Mountain Murder
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Rockies, Carolyn Jansen, 43, is found dead, stuffed into a duct-taped container. Detectives have two suspects but no clear way to tell who is the killer.

programme.title: E1 - Abducted In Anchorage
programme.desc: Folks in Anchorage, Alaska, are shaken to their core when a popular barista goes missing from the town's favourite coffee shop.

programme.title: E8 - Killer Cried Wolf
programme.desc: Local police receive a distressing 911 call from 32-year-old Brian Redding. He is heard crying and screaming that he has found his 16-year-old girlfriend dead in their room.

programme.title: E5 - Search On The Bayou
programme.desc: Matt Riffle investigates the murder of a New Orleans native, who was shot and killed after a brief altercation. Det. Tanisha Smith investigates the homicide of a mother and the abduction of her daughter.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.desc: Cool and brave, Tong is the most famous big brother. Ha, a loyal follower of Tong, is charged murdering his unfaithful wife's lover. Fortunately, he is saved by Tong's lawyer...

programme.title: Stunning Gigi Lai: United We Stand
programme.desc: Alias “Springing Gazelle”, the renowned athlete Miss Chi Cheng is in Hong Kong helping to organize a training programme and hunt for a coach. Olivia was a former brilliant sprinter who has to give up running after her injury in a competition. At the beginning of the training, the girls are too pompous that they despise Olivia, until they find that Olivia is beyond their challenge, they adore her and are willing to go through the hardship but after a winning contest, they feel hostility towards each other and behave proudly. As a result, they lost in the competition with Singapore team. Olivia is so furious...

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E36
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E39
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 高冷孤僻的企業繼承人顧榮儼然是個“傲嬌公子”，而看似軟萌文靜的少女蘇靜靜實則武藝不凡。一場意外讓“元氣少女”蘇靜靜與“不食人間煙火”的顧榮產生交集，還成為他的貼身保鏢。性格、習慣大相徑庭的兩人不得不開啟室友生活，在追求人生目標中攜手蛻變與成長……

programme.title: E3 - Auto Retro Bourguebus
programme.desc: Meeting with the Auto Retro Bourguebus association. Laurent then goes to Ryes, to visit a couple of comic book professionals and admire their collector's Renault 4 CV. Michel presents a sporty Peugeot that was long unloved: the 309 GTI.

programme.title: E3 - Jubilee Of The Vatican, When Rome Regains Its Splendor
programme.desc: In 2025, Rome will host the Vatican Jubilee, an important event for Catholics worldwide that takes place every twenty-five years. More than 32 million visitors are expected in the Italian capital, which takes the opportunity to restore and highlight its architectural and cultural treasures.

programme.title: E2 - The Shepherd And His Lights

programme.title: The Acid Test!
programme.desc: The doctors test how strong your stomach acid really is. And will it be Dr Chris, Dr Xand or Dr Ronx who gets snotted in Ouchology?

programme.title: The Friend (Courteney Cox) and the Showman (Channing Tatum)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, award-winning actress and producer Courteney Cox, of Friends, recounts how she became a TV star and Channing Tatum reflects on how he went from a struggling student to a recognized Hollywood actor.

programme.title: Are Hot Springs Magical?
programme.desc: The Grand Prismatic Spring of Yellowstone National Park in the USA is a rainbow coloured hot spring. The colours are caused by heat loving organisms known as Cyanobacteria and various other bacteria and organisms which contain different types of coloured chemicals.

programme.title: Everyday Challenges
programme.desc: Gemma's Staffy, Slab, is going to the vet. Just when Daisy thought her life was on the mend, she meets a sheepdog that's intent on killing her with kindness. And Charlie's foster mum tries saying goodbye without shedding a tear and fails miserably.

programme.title: Stretchy Shrinky Hair
programme.desc: The doctors make the most of Mr. Grumbles' weekly shower to demonstrate how your hair has a secret skill enabling it to measure moisture in the air.

programme.title: Pneumatic Watermelon Squisher
programme.desc: Max and the gang build a drone-delivered coffee service, a vibrating headband, and a super juicer as they try to qualify for InventiveCon and find a way to keep Max's dad, Bryan, awake at the wheel.

programme.title: Circuit Basics
programme.desc: Smorph's favourite robot toy has stopped working! See how an electrical circuit is made and get the robot working again.

programme.title: The Friend (Courteney Cox) and the Showman (Channing Tatum)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, award-winning actress and producer Courteney Cox, of Friends, recounts how she became a TV star and Channing Tatum reflects on how he went from a struggling student to a recognized Hollywood actor.

programme.title: Day of the Angry Cloud
programme.desc: Ricky can't go out because of the rain, so he makes a water picture inspired by Turner and a 'whatever the weather' hat. When it turns out the weather isn't so bad, it inspires him to make art using a hose pipe and luminous paint.

programme.title: Do Giants Like Hexagons?
programme.desc: The Giant's Causeway in Northern Ireland is made up of around 40,000 interlocking basalt columns, most of which are hexagonal. Nature is very efficient, so it uses this hexagonal arrangement in many places, such as bubbles and beehives.

programme.title: Robberg - Learning About Survival
programme.desc: Four brave young girls enter the mysterious Robberg Peninsula to learn about survival – not only that of plants and animals, but also how our common ancestors lived on this desolate coast. The girls find a cosy cabin and discover where the Peninsula got its name.

programme.title: Actually, It's An Estimate
programme.desc: An approximation is the nearest estimate if we don't know the exact size of something. In this episode, we learn how accurate estimates come about by using clues and information about things in our everyday lives.

programme.title: The Best Toy
programme.desc: The children can't decide which is the best toy in the world. Is it Vik's transformer, Mai's pencil, or Oto's ball? Or maybe Yoko's wooden stick? With some magic and imagination, a wooden stick can be all sorts of things.

programme.title: A New Boy in Town
programme.desc: The ice-dancing girls are desperate for boy partners, and new boy Adriano is moving from Italy to Nottingham to find himself a dance partner. Nine-year-old Charlie lives and breathes ice hockey, but has he got what it takes to impress the coach?

programme.title: Do Giants Like Hexagons?
programme.desc: The Giant's Causeway in Northern Ireland is made up of around 40,000 interlocking basalt columns, most of which are hexagonal. Nature is very efficient, so it uses this hexagonal arrangement in many places, such as bubbles and beehives.
